hero.title: Partner <1>Governance</1> & Security<2>.</2>
hero.desc: Ensuring business integrity, financial transparency and data governance across the SeatNow Network.

onboarding.title: 1. Onboarding & Business Identity
onboarding.desc: SeatNow enforces a strict verification process for all restaurant entities. As a Principal Partner, your identity is vetted by our Internal Audit team to ensure operational legitimacy.

cards.title: Verified Credentials
cards.desc: Accounts are provisioned exclusively by SeatNow Administration. Access is granted via encrypted business credentials.

cards.title: Principal Status
cards.desc: Approved entities receive active Wallet systems and are integrated into the Global Discovery network.

operations.title: Operational Intelligence
operations.slot_desc: To prevent overbooking, SeatNow utilizes a 2-hour default slot allocation. Our Redis Lock technology ensures real-time capacity protection.
operations.protocol_desc: Partners are required to maintain accurate digital menus (MongoDB) and table configurations (SQL) to provide seamless reservation services.
bullets: Real-time status updates: Confirmed, Arrived, and Completed.
QR-Code based check-in for instant verification.
Automatic release of table slots upon completion.

cards.title: Deposit Governance
cards.desc: Customer deposits are held in a secure escrow by SeatNow and settled to the Partner Wallet immediately upon attendee Arrival.

cards.title: Commission Logic
cards.desc: Administrative commissions are deducted quarterly from the Partner Wallet. Net revenue is available for withdrawal upon Admin approval.

cards.title: Cancellation Protection
cards.desc: Cancellations within 3 hours or "No-shows" grant full deposit retention (minus commission) to the restaurant entity.

telemetry.title: 4. Portfolio Telemetry & AI
telemetry.desc: Principal Partners gain access to advanced SeatNow Analytics, providing deep visibility into guest segments (Couple, Small Group, Party) and flexible period benchmarking (Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly).
telemetry.strategic_quote: "Utilize SeatNow AI to predict peak hours, optimize menu performance, and manage withdrawal lifecycles through a unified intelligence interface."

support.title: Business Integrity Support
support.desc: Our Strategic Business Unit is available 24/7 to resolve disputes, manage withdrawal approvals, and assist with technical integration.

profile.title: Restaurant Profile
profile.subtitle: Comprehensive overview of your restaurant's identity and operational policies.

hero.title: Policies & Terms
hero.desc: Committed to bringing the most transparent and premium culinary experiences to our guests.

terms.title: 1. Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to <1>SeatNow</1>. By accessing and using our services, you agree to comply with the following regulations.
terms.p1: Our service provides a platform connecting users with premium restaurants. While we do not directly own the dining venues, we are committed to ensuring the authenticity of the information provided on our system.
list: Users must be at least 18 years old or under the supervision of a legal guardian when using our services.
Personal information provided during registration must be accurate and updated regularly.

privacy.title: 2. Privacy Policy
privacy.security_desc: We use 256-bit SSL encryption technology to protect your personal information and payment data. All information collected is used solely for the purpose of booking confirmation and enhancing service quality.
privacy.p1: We are committed to not sharing your data with any third parties except for the restaurant where you perform your booking. Data includes name, phone number, email, and special dietary requests.

advance.title: Advance Booking
advance.desc: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance for Fine Dining restaurants and 48 hours for major holidays.

guests.title: Number of Guests
guests.desc: For groups of more than 10 people, please contact our customer care department for private room arrangements.

deposit.title: 4. Deposit Policy
deposit.desc: To ensure the rights of both restaurants and customers, some locations require a minimum deposit.
deposit.quote: The deposit amount will be deducted directly from your final bill at the restaurant. In case of a No-show, this amount will not be refunded.

items.title: Cancellation within 3 hours / No-show
items.desc: No refund provided for the deposit amount.

liability.title: 6. Liability
liability.p1: <0>SeatNow</0> is not responsible for claims related to food quality, direct service at the restaurant, or incidents beyond the control of the platform.
liability.p2: However, we commit to acting as an intermediary to resolve any disputes between customers and restaurants in the fairest manner possible.

support.title: 7. Support Contact
support.hero_desc: Our customer support team is available 24/7 to answer any questions regarding these terms.

hero.title: Contact Our Concierge
hero.subtitle: Whether you're seeking a specific table for your dinner or need assistance navigating our collection of premium restaurant partners, our dedicated team is here to orchestrate your perfect dining experience.

placeholders.message: How can our concierge assist you today?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: You can adjust your reservation details up to 24 hours prior via the "Booking Lookup" dashboard or by contacting your concierge.
faq.a2: SeatNow provides complimentary curation for standard bookings. Exclusive tasting events may require a deposit.
faq.a3: For parties of 8 or more, please use our concierge inquiry form above to ensure seamless seating and customized menu options.
